preview.title: VIN 1HGBH41JX… brake wear advisory
preview.snippet: Front pads at 18% remaining. Replace within 1500 mi or 30 days. Estimated labor: 1.2 h.

preview.title: VIN WAUZZZ8K… intermittent knock
preview.snippet: Knock sensor logs spike under 2800–3200 rpm load. Likely fuel quality OR coil #3. Suggest inspection.

preview.title: VIN 5YJ3E1EA… HV pack degradation
preview.snippet: Pack capacity at 87% of nameplate after 78k mi. Rate-of-decline normal; no action required.

preview.title: VIN JN1AZ4EH… tire rotation overdue
preview.snippet: Front-rear wear delta exceeds 2.5/32". Rotate within next service. Schedule via app.
